notes: Add "PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 %command%" as a launch option in Steam. Open up the config when Steam prompts you to. Set it to fullscreen. It will then launch with the Tecmo logo. Press a button on your controller to get to the game menu.
title: DEAD OR ALIVE 5 Last Round: Core Fighters

notes: Must set the settings using the config options available to your before you go into the game to make it fullscreen.
title: DEAD OR ALIVE 5 Last Round: Core Fighters

cpu: AMD Athlon 200GE with Radeon Vega Graphics
notes: Game runs great with the launch command "PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 %command%".  If you run this game on a IGPU/APU you have to make sure that it has more than 1 GB of VRAM to prevent slowdowns.

notes: Run with "PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 %command%" otherwise white screen. 2D movies do not work (screensaver, story mode) black screen with sound and subtitles.
